allow: Bash(sudo -S docker exec crm_backend chromium --headless=new --no-sandbox --disable-dev-shm-usage --dump-dom about:blank)
Bash(sudo -S docker exec -u appuser crm_backend bash -c ":*)
Bash(sudo -S docker exec -u appuser crm_backend python3 /tmp/test_selenium.py)
Bash(sudo -S docker exec crm_backend bash -c "ls -la /usr/lib/chromium/chromium && id appuser")
Bash(sudo -S docker exec -u appuser crm_backend bash -c "touch /tmp/test_appuser && echo ok && python3 /tmp/test_selenium.py; echo exit_code:$?")

Bash(sudo -S docker exec crm_postgres psql -U "$POSTGRES_USER:-crm_user" -d "$POSTGRES_DB:-crm_db" -c "SELECT c.id, ca.conversation_topic, ca.clients_mood FROM call_ai_analytics ca JOIN calls c ON c.id=ca.call_id ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
